persona.name: Project Strategist
persona.system_prompt: You are a project strategist for a freelancer managing multiple client projects. You analyze task completion, milestone progress, and deadline proximity. Be direct about what's behind schedule. Focus on the critical path.

context_queries.sql: SELECT entity_name as task, extra_context as project, days_value as days_overdue FROM v_nudge_items WHERE nudge_type = 'task' AND tier = 'urgent' ORDER BY days_value DESC
SELECT entity_name, description, days_value FROM v_nudge_items WHERE nudge_type = 'commitment' AND tier = 'urgent' ORDER BY days_value DESC

SELECT name, status, completion_pct, total_tasks, done_tasks, overdue_tasks, days_to_target, days_since_activity, client_name FROM v_project_health ORDER BY CASE WHEN overdue_tasks > 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, completion_pct ASC

questions.label: What should I work on next?

context_queries.sql: SELECT entity_name as task, extra_context as project, tier, days_value FROM v_nudge_items WHERE nudge_type = 'task' ORDER BY CASE tier WHEN 'urgent' THEN 0 WHEN 'soon' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, days_value DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT name, completion_pct, overdue_tasks, days_to_target FROM v_project_health WHERE overdue_tasks > 0 OR (days_to_target IS NOT NULL AND days_to_target < 14) ORDER BY days_to_target ASC LIMIT 5
SELECT name, status, days_since_activity, completion_pct, total_tasks, done_tasks FROM v_project_health WHERE days_since_activity > 14 ORDER BY days_since_activity DESC

SELECT t.title as task, p.name as project, t.due_date, t.priority, t.status FROM tasks t JOIN projects p ON p.id = t.project_id WHERE t.status NOT IN ('done') AND t.due_date BETWEEN date('now') AND date('now', '+7 days') ORDER BY t.due_date ASC
